---
title: "Training"
format: html
---

## Basic R Training – NDMC, EPHI (2026) (April 28 – May 2, 2026)

🔗 [Training link](https://github.com/leykunget/Basic-R-Training-2026)

## Basic R training organized by the Health System Research Directorate, EPHI (October 14 – 17, 2025)

🔗 [Training link](https://github.com/leykunget/basic-r-training-hs)  

## Data Carpentry with R Workshop (May 31-Jun 01, 2024)

🔗 [Training link](https://leykunget.github.io/2024-05-31-wollo-university-main-campus-dc-with-R/)
